Module me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.core

Package me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.debug

package me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.debug
Debug tooling for FlixelGDX.

This package contains the debug overlay, watch utilities, and helpers used to inspect and diagnose game behavior during development.

Debug behavior is typically controlled by Flixel.setDebugMode(boolean) and by the runtime mode set by platform launchers.

  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx
    The core package of the FlixelGDX framework.
  • Class
    Description
    FlixelDebugDrawable
    Interface for objects that can draw a debug bounding box in the FlixelDebugOverlay.
    FlixelDebugOverlay
    The in-game debug overlay drawn as a separate layer on top of the entire game (including over the UI stage).
    FlixelDebugWatchManager
    Manages the variable watch list for the debug overlay.
